---
title: "Our Course Project"
sidebar: false 
---

I'm honored to be a member of the \[R'a-beni-l??tfen\] project team.

Below, you'll find a brief summary of our project. To access a detailed project description, please go to [https://\[your-project-url\]](https://emu-hacettepe-analytics.github.io/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/){.uri}.

**Summary**

\[This study aims to investigate the correlation between USD/TRY exchange rate movements and the performance of various sectoral indices in Turkey. We are specifically analyzing whether currency volatility serves as a significant driver for returns in the BIST 100, Electricity (XU:ELEKT), and Industrial (XU:SIN) sectors. #Data Set This study is built upon a comprehensive financial dataset spanning a 20-year period from January 2006 to May 2026. The primary variables analyzed include:\]
